ownerChat.text: brezzy... furnace won't place. tried forward, below, above — all failed. what do i do?

Select the furnace (minecraft:furnace) in your hotbar, aim at the face/top of a solid block and use the place button (right-click/trigger) — you cannot place it in mid-air or on replaceable blocks like tall grass/snow. If you're in Adventure mode or on a protected server/land-claim you won't be allowed to place either (check with /gamemode survival or ask the server admin); tell me your edition (Java/Bedrock) and server status if it still fails.

ownerChat.text: bro... crafting table won't place. i have 24 diamonds but can't craft the armor. help?

If the crafting table (minecraft:crafting_table) won't place you’re probably in Adventure mode, blocked by spawn protection/land-claim, or lacking permission on a server — check your gamemode (/gamemode survival) or ask an admin, or use /setblock ~ ~ ~ minecraft:crafting_table if you have cheats.  
You have exactly enough diamonds (minecraft:diamond) for a full set: helmet 5, chestplate 8, leggings 7, boots 4, but you need a 3x3 crafting table to make them.

ownerChat.text: hey, where are the trees? im still stuck on the log objective

Trees spawn in most grassy biomes (plains, forest, taiga, jungle) — look for brown trunks with green leaves; any log counts (oak_log, birch_log, spruce_log, etc.). If your world is a desert/superflat with no trees, use /locate biome minecraft:forest or give yourself a log with /give @p oak_log 1 (or switch to /gamemode creative).

ownerChat.text: hey i still need 8 logs for my objective but i cant find any trees around. do you know where a forest is?

Forests are common — look for the "forest", "birch_forest", "dark_forest" or "taiga" biomes (in Java press F3 to see the Biome) or just head toward greener, tree-filled terrain a few hundred blocks away. If you can't find one, tear down village buildings or fences for wood (common IDs: minecraft:oak_log, minecraft:birch_log, minecraft:spruce_log, minecraft:acacia_log, minecraft:dark_oak_log).
